settings.title: Cedar deck & pergola
settings.summary: A rotting deck replaced with four hundred square feet of cedar, a timber pergola, and footings sized for the hot tub that's coming later.
settings.description:
The old deck was original to the house and past saving — undersized joists, rusted hangers, and posts sitting on soil. We demolished it in a day and started over from the footings.

The new structure is framed to current code with a pergola over the dining end for summer shade. Because the owners mentioned a hot tub was on the someday list, we oversized the footings and framing in that corner now — a few hundred dollars during construction instead of a rebuild later.

Three weeks, including the permit. The cedar will silver out over a couple of seasons; the structure underneath is rated for decades.
